role: Deputy Foreign Minister; Iran's UN Ambassador (2019–2023)
bio: Majid Takht-Ravanchi is a career Iranian diplomat who served as deputy foreign minister for European and American affairs and was a member of Iran's nuclear negotiating team during the [JCPOA](/events/jcpoa-nuclear-deal-2015) talks. He later served as Iran's ambassador to the United Nations from 2019 to 2023. Leaked emails revealed that [Saeed Khatibzadeh](/people/saeed-khatibzadeh) sent his original proposal for the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023) to Takht-Ravanchi alongside IPIS head [Mostafa Zahrani](/people/mostafa-zahrani).
editorial_notes: Member of JCPOA negotiating team. UN ambassador 2019-2023.
